title: State Dept. scrambles to aid stranded Americans amid attacks, airport closures
summary_full: The Trump administration said it is looking to use a mix of military and chartered flights to help U.S. citizens leave the Middle East as Iran steps up retaliatory strikes.
summary_public: The Trump administration said it is looking to use a mix of military and chartered flights to help U.S. citizens leave the Middle East as Iran steps up retaliatory strikes.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: as Iran steps up retaliatory strikes.
